content.full_text:
October 27, 1989


Dan Yager
Secretary/Treasurer
Yes on Sutter Fire Measure
"A" Committee
P.O. Box 535
Sutter, California 95982

Re: Your Request For Advice
Our File No. A-89-462-5G/

Dear Mr. Yager:

You have requested confirmation of telephone advice provided to you on behalf of the Yes on Sutter Fire Measure "A" Committee concerning the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political Reform Act.1/

Your letter, dated September 25, 1989, correctly states the advice I provided to you that the Yes on Sutter Fire Measure "A" Committee is not required to file Form 420, a recipient committee is any person, organization or entity which receives contributions totaling $1,000 or more in a calendar year. (Section 82013(a).) You have stated that your committee will not receive $1,000 in the calendar year. You should write to the Secretary of State and your county clerk with whom you filed the Form 410 and advise them that you will not qualify as a recipient committee and that you would like to rescind the Form 410 that you previously submitted. As long as you do not qualify as a committee, you will not have any filing obligations under the Act. A copy of your letter is enclosed for your convenience.


_____________________
1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.


428 J Street, Suite 800 ● P.O. Box 807 ● Sacramento CA 95804-0807 ● (916) 322-5660

Dan Yager
Page 2

     Please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you
have additional questions.

                                        Sincerely,


                                        Kathryn E. Donovan
                                        General Counsel

                                        [signature: Alice Hughes]

                                  By:  Alice Hughes
                                       Political Reform Consultant

Enclosure

9-25-89

FPPC
SEP 27 8 59 AM '89

Miss. Hughes;

This letter is to follow up on the phone conversations we had regarding the proper paperwork to fill out for our newly formed committee. From my understanding, we needn't submit Form 420 if we haven't received or spent $1,000.00. Could you please verify this in writing and give the proper references in the event we are called to provide this information?

Also, are there any other forms we need to submit? To whom do I write the letter in regards to rescinding our Form 410, or can we leave the Form as it stands? Would it be possible to update the Form 410 with current information as to wether we are a qualifying or non-qualifying committee?

Any information you could offer would be greatly appreciated. Thank you for all your patients in helping me with this matter. For questions I can be reached at (916)755-0266.

Thank you again!

Sincerely,

Dan Yager

Sec./Treas.
Yes on Sutter Fire Measure "A" Comm.

P O BOX 535K
Sutter CA 95982

9-25-89

FPPC

SEP 27 8:59 AM '89


Miss. Hughes;

     This letter is to follow up on the phone conversations we had re-

garding the proper paperwork to fill out for our newly formed committee.

From my understanding, we needn't submit Form 420 if we haven't received

or spent $1,000.00.  Could you please verify this in writing and give the

proper references in the event we are called to provide this information?

     Also, are there any other forms we need to submit?  To whom do I

write the letter in regards to rescinding our Form 410, or can we leave

the Form as it stands?  Would it be possible to update the Form 410

with current information as to wether we are a qualifying or non-qualifying

committee?

     Any information you could offer would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for all your patients in helping me with this matter.  For

questions I can be reached at (916)755-0266.




                                        Thank you again!

                                        Sincerely,

                                        [signature]
                                        Dan Yager

                                        Sec./Treas.
                                        Yes on Sutter Fire Measure "A" Comm.

                                        PO BOX 535

                                        SUTTER, CA 95982

California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

October 2, 1989

Dan Yager
Secretary/Treasurer
Yes on Sutter Fire Measure
"A" Committee
P.O. Box 535
Sutter, CA  95982

Re:  Letter No. 89-561

Dear Mr. Yager:

     We received your letter requesting confirmation of advice
under the Political Reform Act on September 27, 1989.  Your letter
has been assigned to our Technical Assistance and Analysis
Division for response.  If you have any questions, you may contact
that division directly at (916) 322-5662.

     If the letter is appropriate for confirmation without further
analysis, we will attempt to expedite our response.  A confirming
response will be released after it has gone through our approval
process.  If the letter is not appropriate for this treatment, the
staff person assigned to prepare the response will contact you
shortly to advise you.  In such cases, the normal analysis, review
and approval process will be followed.

     You should be aware that your letter and our response are
public records which may be disclosed to any interested person
upon receipt of a proper request for disclosure.

                                        Sincerely,

                                        [illegible]
                                        Kathryn E. Donovan
                                        General Counsel

428 J Street, Suite 800 ● P.O. Box 807 ● Sacramento CA 95804-0807 ● (916) 322-5660
